creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a slightly modified patch which sets the expiration date to 2017-03-01 and mentions the CVE number.

Adding bdrewery as he maintains net/librsync2 and perhaps can shed some light on which version is what (net/librsync2 = 1.0.1, or is 1.0.1 a successor of 0.9.7 ?)
